description: Agriculture operations level 1 demo domain pack.

invariants.description: Operating signal should remain within configured tolerance.
Collar sensor reading must pass normalization without error. A failed normalization indicates hardware fault or corrupt data.
Composite signal index must stay within the operational band (0.2..0.9). Values outside this range indicate sensor drift or environmental anomaly.
Signal has drifted outside tolerance for >= 30% of the recent monitoring window.
Signal outside tolerance for >= 50% of recent window or 3+ consecutive turns. Requires intervention.

standing_orders.description: Request additional operational details from the subject.
Request the operator to re-read the collar sensor. If re-read also fails, escalate to site manager for hardware inspection.
Notify the site manager that the signal has exceeded operational bounds. Pause data collection until the anomaly is resolved.

escalation_triggers.condition: Standing order exhausted and signal remains outside tolerance after max_attempts. Requires physical field inspection.
escalation_triggers.recommended_action: Dispatch field operator to inspect sensor and environment. Review last N readings for pattern.

escalation_triggers.condition: Collar sensor returned invalid readings for 3+ consecutive turns, indicating potential hardware failure.
escalation_triggers.recommended_action: Replace or recalibrate the sensor unit. Review recent logs for correlated failures.

staff.description: Site managers and field operators with group-level access to agricultural operations.

roles.description: On-site operational manager with full read/write/execute access to operations data.
Field workers who execute operational procedures and log observations.
Read-only observers of agricultural operations data.

actor_types.label: Sensor
actor_types.description: IoT device producing field-operations evidence through continuous environmental readings.

actor_types.label: Farm Operator
actor_types.description: Human operator making field decisions and recording observations.

environmental_monitors.description: Sensors and IoT devices that produce continuous environmental readings.

field_crew.description: Human operators and technicians who make field decisions and record observations.

group_libraries.description: Sensor normalization, tolerance checking, and batch aggregation for field-operations IoT devices.
Turn interpretation output schema — defines the JSON structure the SLM must emit when classifying operator intent.
